'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 22''' is the twenty-second and final issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']] before the periodical was rebranded as ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''. Issue 22 was published in Spring [[1994]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Straight From The Horse's Mouth: Dark Horse Comics"
*Star Wars News
*Lucasfilm's Latest
*"Star Wars Licensing"
*"[[The Dark Side Illuminated]]"
*"[[Star Wars Screen Entertainment]] Brings the Force to Computers"
*"Ready For My Close-Up, Mr. Lucas"
